risk_note.tr: Yanlis surucu geri alinirsa donanim calismayabilir. Once sistem geri yukleme noktasi olusturun.
risk_note.en: Rolling back the wrong driver may break hardware. Create a System Restore point first.

prerequisites.tr: Sorun cikaran surucunun adi (Device Manager > Properties > Driver tab)
prerequisites.en: Name of the problematic driver (Device Manager > Properties > Driver tab)

body.tr: Win+X > Device Manager. Sorunlu cihazi bul (sariUNTAG, BSOD raporunda gozuken surucu kategorisi).
body.en: Win+X > Device Manager. Locate the problematic device (yellow exclamation, or category from BSOD report).

body.tr: Cihaza sag tikla > Properties > Driver tab > 'Roll Back Driver'. Buton gri ise: onceki surucunun yedegi yok, Step 4'e ge.
body.en: Right-click device > Properties > Driver tab > 'Roll Back Driver'. If grayed out: no previous driver kept, go to Step 4.

body.tr: Acilan dialogda sebep sec (BSOD / Performance / Other). Restart istenir; isi kaydet, yeniden baslat.
body.en: Pick a reason in the dialog (BSOD / Performance / Other). Reboot required; save work and restart.

body.tr: Donanim ureticisinin sitesinden eski versiyonu indir. Device Manager > Update Driver > Browse my computer > Let me pick > 'Have Disk' ile inf dosyasini sec.
body.en: Download older version from vendor site. Device Manager > Update Driver > Browse my computer > Let me pick > 'Have Disk' and select the inf file.

body.tr: Windows tekrar yeni surucu yuklemesin: 'wushowhide.diagcab' arac ile sorunlu guncellemeyi gizle (Microsoft resmi araci).
body.en: Prevent Windows from re-installing new driver: use 'wushowhide.diagcab' (Microsoft official tool) to hide the offending update.
